items.briefing:
Australian organisations are being warned that spear phishing — highly targeted fake emails — is a leading cause of payment fraud losses, and AI tools are making these attacks easier and more convincing than ever. Scammers are crafting personalised messages that can trick even careful staff into approving fraudulent payments or sharing sensitive credentials. Registered training organisations, which handle student fees and supplier payments, are a realistic target.

If your organisation uses SolarWinds Serv-U for file transfers, a known vulnerability is now being actively exploited to crash servers — apply available patches immediately if you haven't already.

**Practical tip:** Before approving any payment request received by email, verify it via a separate phone call to a known contact number — not one provided in the email itself.

featured.title: PhishByte warns spear phishing drives payment fraud losses
featured.quote: Australian firms losing significant money to targeted email payment fraud scams.
